title: AI Museum Diorama
description: Turns a photo into a curated museum diorama display.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a curated museum diorama display. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, main composition, outfit colors, and scene context as realistic miniature figures in a glass-front exhibit. Add controlled gallery lighting, display base, carefully crafted terrain or interior details, subtle reflections, and educational-exhibit polish without readable labels.
negative_prompt: readable text, labels, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted figures, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, messy clutter, harsh glare, low quality, blurry, cartoonish unless requested
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. natural history diorama, glass museum exhibit...
